name: X-Golf Solon
about: X-Golf Solon is an indoor golf facility featuring eight state-of-the-art simulators with advanced tracking technology. The venue combines golf simulation with a full-service sports bar and event space, creating a multi-purpose environment for both play and social gatherings. Pricing is structured per bay, per hour, with a monthly membership option offering discounted rates and additional perks for dedicated players.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with unparalleled accuracy and realism
Comprehensive membership program with significant savings and perks
Professional instruction available with advanced swing analysis technology

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with catering options and food menus available
Full service bar featuring local craft beers

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and customers are welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned. The venue has a full-service bar and kitchen offering food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes about one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. With more players, you may need to book an additional hour per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes children of all ages and offers activities suitable for families.
